display_text: Wraith King Aghanim's Scepter: Reduces Reincarnation cooldown. This upgrade counters the enemy's timing windows by allowing Wraith King to re-enter fights more frequently, making him a relentless threat and forcing the enemy to delay engagements or focus him down repeatedly.
search_text: Wraith King Aghanim Scepter counter-timing fight frequency reincarnation cooldown relentless threat

display_text: Wraith King Aghanim's Shard: Removes Reincarnation mana cost, ensuring Wraith King can always revive even when silenced or mana-drained. This upgrade counters mana burn and silence mechanics, solidifying Wraith King's role as an unkillable frontline tank.
search_text: Wraith King Aghanim Shard anti-silence mana burn mana cost reincarnation unkillable frontline tank
